headlines.description: — Sam Darnold figured the Vikings would recover the Bears' onside kick near the end of regulation and he would only need to kneel.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sam Darnold leads game-winning drive in OT and Vikings beat Bears 30-27 after blowing late lead

headlines.description: — Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions spent three months scoring at a historic rate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lions rush for 3 scores and use stingy defense to beat Colts 24-6 for 9th straight win

events.name: New England Patriots at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — Mike McDaniel has seen a change in quarterback Tua Tagovailoa over the past month.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tagovailoa carves up Pats with 4 TDs, Dolphins win 3rd straight game with 34-15 rout of New England

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield embarrassed the woeful Giants with his arm and legs, and if that wasn't enough, he rubbed it in by mimicking New York fan favorite Tommy...
headlines.shortLinkText: Baker Mayfield mocks Tommy DeVito's celebration as the Bucs embarrass the Giants 30-7

headlines.description: — Austin Seibert choked back tears taking responsibility for missing the extra point that would have tied the score in the final minute. Jeremy Reaves choked back tears blaming himself for a missed assignment that led to a kickoff return touchdown....
headlines.shortLinkText: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — Ten yards into a scramble, Patrick Mahomes could have easily slid for a first down or simply ducked out of bounds and moved on to the next play.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs win at the buzzer again, topping Panthers 30-27 on Shrader's field goal

headlines.description: — Will Levis and the Tennessee Titans were far from perfect Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Levis throws 2 TD passes to help Titans outlast Texans 32-27

events.name: Denver Broncos at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — The music could clearly be heard outside the doors to the Broncos' locker room, the players inside truly enjoying finally getting to experience a victory in Las Vegas.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bo Nix sets Broncos rookie TD record as Denver beats reeling Raiders 29-19

events.name: San Francisco 49ers at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — The Green Bay Packers earned a measure of revenge against the team that ended their season last year.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Jacobs runs for 3 TDs as Packers roll past short-handed 49ers 38-10

headlines.description: — Coby Bryant returned an interception 69 yards for a touchdown and Leonard Williams had 2 1/2 sacks as the Seahawks tormented Cardinals quarterback Kyler Murray, and Seattle beat...
headlines.shortLinkText: Coby Bryant's pick-6 highlights big day for Seahawks' defense in 16-6 win over Cardinals

events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — When Saquon Barkley glanced up at a SoFi Stadium replay of his latest huge run for the Philadelphia Eagles on Sunday night, he happened to see a graphic indicating he had 173 yards rushing — only 16 shy of what he knew to be his career high.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saquon Barkley sets Eagles franchise record with 255 yards rushing, 2 TDs in a 37-20 win over Rams
